title: scorzonera hispanica subsp. glastifolia
intro: Scorzonera hispanica subsp. glastifolia, also known as Spanish scorzonera, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its tall stems and edible roots. The roots of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Scorzonera hispanica subsp. glastifolia include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as support for digestive health. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
